Color roles

Background--bg
Surface--surface
Surface warm--surface-warm
Ink--fg
Ink 2--fg-2
Muted--muted
Meta--meta
Border--border
Border soft--border-soft
Accent — terracotta--accent
Accent hover--accent-hover
Accent active--accent-active
Success--success
Warn--warn
Danger--danger

One accent per screen: the primary action and the active-nav marker. Accent on white passes AA at 5.06:1 (DS-4). Light theme only in v1 (DS-7).
